entries.claim_text: Meta-Harness: End-to-End Optimization of Model Harnesses
entries.quoted_snippet: Meta-Harness: End-to-End Optimization of Model Harnesses
colm2026_conference

entries.claim_text: Yoonho Lee, Roshen Nair, Qizheng Zhang, Kangwook Lee, Omar Khattab, Chelsea Finn
entries.quoted_snippet: Yoonho Lee

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/stanford-iris-lab/meta-harness-tbench2-artifact
entries.quoted_snippet: https://github.com/stanford-iris-lab/meta-harness-tbench2-artifact

entries.claim_text: paper
entries.quoted_snippet: colm2026_conference

entries.claim_text: Meta-Harness search loop figure
entries.quoted_snippet: reads a filesystem containing all prior candidates

entries.claim_text: 文字分類搜尋進度
entries.quoted_snippet: matching the next-best method's final accuracy after just 4 evaluations

entries.claim_text: 決定「要儲存什麼、要檢索什麼、要把什麼呈現給模型」的那段程式碼
entries.quoted_snippet: The \textit{harness}---the code that determines what to store, retrieve, and show to the model

entries.claim_text: 有的只看純量分數、有的只看當前候選、有的把回饋限制成短模板或 LLM 生成的摘要
entries.quoted_snippet: they typically operate with short-horizon or heavily compressed feedback

entries.claim_text: 透過**檔案系統**存取「完整歷史」
entries.quoted_snippet: the filesystem stores the source code, evaluation scores, and execution traces

entries.claim_text: 把該次的所有 log（提出的程式碼、推理軌跡、評測分數）寫進檔案系統的新目錄
entries.quoted_snippet: stored in the filesystem in a new directory, and the loop repeats

entries.claim_text: 執行一條 rollout 軌跡
entries.quoted_snippet: we execute a rollout trajectory

entries.claim_text: r(\tau, x)
entries.quoted_snippet: \tau \sim p_M(H, x)

entries.claim_text: 作者改以 Pareto 支配來評比候選
entries.quoted_snippet: we evaluate candidates under Pareto dominance and report the resulting frontier

entries.claim_text: P 提出 k 個新的 harness
entries.quoted_snippet: Proposer $P$ proposes $k$ new harnesses

entries.claim_text: 提議者每個迭代讀取的檔案數中位數是 82
entries.quoted_snippet: The proposer reads a median of 82 files per iteration

entries.claim_text: 逐一收到帶標籤的樣本、更新記憶、再在保留測試集上評測
entries.quoted_snippet: an LLM receives labeled examples one at a time, updates its memory, and is evaluated on a held-out test set

entries.claim_text: 把高度相似但標籤不同的範例並排
entries.quoted_snippet: query-anchored contrastive pairs
Meta-Harness improves online text classification accuracy while using a smaller input context

entries.claim_text: 比 ACE 高 7.7 分、比 MCE 高 8.6 分
entries.quoted_snippet: outperforming ACE by 7.7 points and MCE by 8.6 points

entries.claim_text: scores-only 中位數 34.6、最佳 41.3
entries.quoted_snippet: scores-only reaches 34.6 median and 41.3 best accuracy

entries.claim_text: 在全部五個保留模型上都勝過「不檢索」基準，平均進步 4.7 分
entries.quoted_snippet: The discovered retrieval harness outperforms the no-retrieval baseline across all five held-out models

entries.claim_text: 達到 76.4% 通過率，超過人工調校的 Terminus-KIRA（74.7%）
entries.quoted_snippet: 76.4\% pass rate, surpassing the hand-engineered Terminus-KIRA

entries.claim_text: harness 對 LLM 系統表現的影響是真實且被廣泛觀察到的
entries.quoted_snippet: Changing the harness around a fixed large language model

entries.claim_text: 若與最接近的固定基準 BM25 比，整體只領先 1.3 分
這比較像是一個被 2026 年前後 coding agent 能力躍升所解鎖的工程配置
沒有獨立的保留切分
「幾小時 wall-clock」的說法掩蓋了可觀的 token 與 API 成本
